title: BoyScoutTodoItem
description: A refactoring opportunity detected by Boy Scout hooks or recorded by Claude.

file_path.description: Path to the affected file, relative to project root

locations.description: One or more line ranges where the issue occurs

severity.description: Impact level of the refactoring opportunity

detected_at.description: Unix timestamp when the opportunity was detected

source.description: Whether detected automatically (hook) or recorded by Claude (skill)

dismissed.description: Whether this item has been reviewed and dismissed

context.description: Optional additional context or suggested approach
